Home.title: The right pool villa, with your money protected
Home.subtitle: Every stay is verified. Hosts are paid only after you check out.

Auth.signInSubtitle: Use your LINE account to sign in
Auth.errorAccountNotLinked: This account is already linked to another sign-in method.

Otp.title: Verify your phone
Otp.subtitle: Verify your phone number to send booking requests and message hosts.
Otp.sent: Code sent to {phone}. Enter the 6 digits within 10 minutes.
Otp.devHint: Dev mode: the code is printed to the server log (console).
Otp.errorInvalidPhone: Invalid number. Use a Thai mobile (06/08/09).
Otp.errorRateLimited: A code was just sent. Please wait a moment and try again.
Otp.errorExpired: The code expired. Please request a new one.
Otp.errorTooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Please request a new code.
Otp.errorNoActiveCode: No active code. Please request a new one.
Otp.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

Admin.dashboardIntro: Back of house: verify listings, move money, and judge disputes.
Admin.loginSubtitle: Staff only — password and 2-factor code required.

Footer.trustLine: Your money stays with U-Rest until you check out

Wizard.title: List your villa
Wizard.intro: Complete each step — we autosave your draft as you go.
Wizard.photosHint: At least 5 photos; pick one as the cover.
Wizard.uploadStubNote: Dev mode: real R2 upload wires in later (#11)

bookingMode.REQUEST_HINT: Guests request; you confirm before they pay.
bookingMode.INSTANT_HINT: Guests book and pay immediately; no confirmation step.

Wizard.instantAck: My calendar is always up to date — if a stale calendar causes a paid double-booking, the system cancels as CANCELLED_BY_HOST and records a strike immediately.
Wizard.seasonsHint: Define special-price ranges (e.g. high season); ranges must not overlap.
Wizard.kycHint: Every villa is identity-checked before it goes live — this is what lets guests pay with confidence. Documents are stored privately and seen only by our review team.

kycDocTypes.RIGHT_TO_RENT: Proof of ownership / right to rent

Wizard.kycRedactNote: Please cover or black out the religion line on your ID copy before uploading.
Wizard.kycNameMatchWarning: The account name must match the name on your ID — a mismatch delays approval.
Wizard.payoutSavedMasked: For your security, re-enter your account number to confirm.
Wizard.kycConsentLabel: I consent to U-Rest processing these documents to verify my identity (privacy policy).
Wizard.errorSeasonOverlap: Season ranges overlap — please make them disjoint.
Wizard.errorSeasonIncomplete: Fill in dates and rates for every season.
Wizard.errorIncomplete: Fill in all required fields before submitting.
Wizard.errorInstantAck: Accept the calendar terms before enabling instant book.
Wizard.errorKycIncomplete: Upload your Thai ID, proof of right to rent, and a selfie, and accept the consent.
Wizard.errorPayoutRequired: Add a valid payout bank account before submitting.
Wizard.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

Search.title: Find a villa
Search.noResultsHint: Try widening your dates or removing filters
Search.aiSuggest: Let AI pick from these results

ListingDetail.cancellationFlexible: Free cancellation up to 24 hrs before check-in
ListingDetail.cancellationModerate: Free cancellation up to 5 days before check-in
ListingDetail.cancellationStrict: Free cancellation up to 14 days before check-in
ListingDetail.reviewsEmpty: No reviews yet — be the first to stay
ListingDetail.conciergeChip: Ask น้องเรสต์ about this villa

BookingCard.title: Check price & book
BookingCard.ctaNoCharge: No charge yet — pay after the host confirms
BookingCard.ctaInstantCharge: Immediate payment — confirmed right away, no waiting

Concierge.pageTitle: น้องเรสต์ (AI Concierge)
Concierge.inputPlaceholder: Ask น้องเรสต์… e.g. villa for 10 near Jomtien Beach with karaoke
Concierge.greeting: Hi! I'm น้องเรสต์, your AI villa finder. Tell me what you're looking for 🏖️
Concierge.examplePrompt1: Villa for 10 near Jomtien, with karaoke
Concierge.examplePrompt2: Pool villa under ฿5,000/night with a slide
Concierge.restModeTitle: น้องเรสต์ is resting 🌙
Concierge.errorGeneric: น้องเรสต์ hit a snag — please try again.
Concierge.errorDailyLimit: You've reached today's {limit}-message limit. Come back tomorrow!
Concierge.errorTokenCeiling: This conversation got very long. Start a fresh chat below.
Concierge.loginPrompt: Sign in to save your chat history and unlock all features

SavedVillas.emptyHint: Tap the heart on any villa to save it for later
SavedVillas.errorGeneric: Something went wrong, please try again
